content: I didn’t kidnap anyone. I’ve been in jail since October 12 for a petty theft charge — you can check the Noida Central Jail records. My motorcycle was stolen on October 13. I reported it to the police. I never saw it again. I don’t know who used it. I don’t know Ramesh Kumar. I don’t know Manoj Verma. I’m just a poor man trying to survive. I didn’t send any ransom messages. I don’t even have a phone right now. I didn’t go near Sector 62. I swear on my mother’s grave.
